唔知點解用上面ching嗰條code係呢個example到work但係擺落我自己啲data就唔得

quote.msg: cell B2: =IF(AND(NOT(ISERROR(MATCH(B$1,$M$2:$M$5,0))),NOT(ISERROR(MATCH($A2,$N$2:$N$5,0)))),IF(MATCH(B$1,$M$2:$M$5,0)=MATCH($A2,$N$2:$N$5,0),TRUE,""),"")

replies.msg: 唔好意思ching，想問下呢條code有冇話幾時係唔work嘅？因為我對住你呢條code打係我啲data到改咗啲reference cell佢就唔work了

B2:

=IF(OR(B$1&$A2=($M$2:$M$5&$N$2:$N$5)),TRUE,"")

記得係用array, 姐係打完條formula要用ctrl+shift+enter 而唔係就咁enter
你會見到佢自動加左{ }係頭尾

然後copy去其他cells, copy既時候唔好連埋B2黎paste, excel會鬧,因為唔可以paste野落原有array formula既cell

又或者

=SUM(--(B$1&$A2=($M$2:$M$5&$N$2:$N$5)))

都係一樣要用array, 呢條式係count有幾多個data match到(例如右邊data有2個1G咁相對應個cell就會出2）, 雖然你呢個例子無重覆data所以只有1同0
搞咁大條formula睇到人都癲，不如vba啦
Pivot table

跟住樓上巴打玩咗一次條式
呆咗

BTW有有啲現代少少嘅方法

replies.msg: 你是咪打漏咗啲 $$$?
舊方法就Index + match清晰d

一開始做左Vlookup, 張A-G轉做對應row既數字先
跟住再用vba code就搞店↓

Sub test()
Dim p As Integer
For p = 3 To 11
Cells(Cells(p,15), Cells(p,13)+1).Value = "ok"
Next p
End Sub

replies.msg:
直接COPY呢堆VBA CODE搞店!紅字自己改
如果data set係M3:N10000, 就將紅字改做10000
Sub test()

Dim a, b As Integer
For a = 3 To 11
For b = 2 To 8
If (Cells(a, 14).Value = Cells(b, 1).Value) Then
Cells(a, 15).Value = b
End If
Next b
Next a


Dim p As Integer
For p = 3 To 11
Cells(Cells(p, 15), Cells(p, 13) + 1).Value = "OK"
Next p

End Sub

搞店啦, 樓主直接COPY晒藍色字既VBA CODE
因為太多數據, 費事HAND機, 樓主RUN之前要BACKUP原始FILE先RUN
我分開左4個MARCO, 你RUN完果陣有晒指示架啦

Sub GO1()
Columns("E:E").Select
Selection.Insert Shift:=xlToRight, CopyOrigin:=xlFormatFromLeftOrAbove
Columns("E:E").Select
Selection.Insert Shift:=xlToRight, CopyOrigin:=xlFormatFromLeftOrAbove
Columns("E:E").Select
Selection.Insert Shift:=xlToRight, CopyOrigin:=xlFormatFromLeftOrAbove
Range(Cells(1, 10), Cells(1, 2544)).Copy 'E
Cells(1, 5).Select
Selection.PasteSpecial Paste:=xlPasteAll, Operation:=xlNone, SkipBlanks:= _
False, Transpose:=True
Cells(1, 6).Value = 10 'F
Cells(2, 6).Value = 11
Range("F1:F2").Select
Selection.AutoFill Destination:=Range("F1:F2540")
Range("F1:F2541").Select
Cells(1, 8).Value = 2 'H
Cells(2, 8).Value = 3
Range("H1:H2").Select
Selection.AutoFill Destination:=Range("H1:H4620")
Range("H1:H4620").Select
Range(Cells(2, 9), Cells(4621, 9)).Copy 'G
Cells(1, 7).PasteSpecial Paste:=xlPasteValues
MsgBox "跟住請run GO2"
End Sub

Sub GO2()
Cells(1, 3).Value = "=VLOOKUP(A1,$E:$F,2,0)" 'CCCCCCCCC
Cells(1, 3).Select
Selection.AutoFill Destination:=Range(Cells(1, 3), Cells(242046, 3))
Range(Cells(1, 3), Cells(242046, 3)).Select
MsgBox "請run GO3"
End Sub

Sub GO3()
Cells(1, 4).Value = "=VLOOKUP(B1,$G:$H,2,0)" 'DDDDDDDDDD
Cells(1, 4).Select
Selection.AutoFill Destination:=Range(Cells(1, 4), Cells(242046, 4))
Range(Cells(1, 4), Cells(242046, 4)).Select
MsgBox "請run GO4"
End Sub
Sub GO4()


Dim k As Integer
For k = 1 To 2540
If IsNumeric(Cells(k, 3).Value) Then
If IsNumeric(Cells(k, 4).Value) Then
Cells(Cells(k, 4), Cells(k, 3)).Value = "ok"
'Cells(Cells(k, 3), Cells(k, 1) + 6).Font.Color = RGB(100, 20, 10)
End If
End If
Next k
Columns("C:E").Select
Selection.Delete Shift:=xlToLeft
Columns("C:E").Select
Selection.ClearContents
MsgBox "搞店晒!!!"
End Sub
